title: Self-Distillation Policy Optimization via Visual Feedback: Bridging Code and Visual Artifacts
authors: Haoyu Dong
abstract: Code-generating large language models (LLMs) increasingly produce visual artifacts such as charts, web pages, and slides by writing programs that are executed by non-differentiable renderers, committing to code before observing the render. As a result, otherwise executable code often yields artifacts with visually salient defects, including overlapping elements, clipped text, broken alignment, low contrast, and overflow. We study visual-feedback self-distillation for code-generated visual artifacts. We propose Visual-SDPO, a self-distillation policy-optimization framework that treats rendered visual feedback as privileged context for a weight-sharing teacher and distills this feedback into a coding student. To make supervision spatially targeted rather than uniform, we introduce Visual-Grounded Code Credit Weighting, which traces each detected defect back to the code statements responsible for the affected elements and amplifies the distillation signal on those statements. A sequence-level GRPO (Group Relative Policy Optimization) term complements the dense token-level objective by rewarding executable, visually high-quality rollouts, while failed executions remain learnable through the self-distillation path by passing execution errors as privileged context to the teacher. We instantiate Visual-SDPO for chart, web/UI, and slide generation with a unified Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct backbone. Across chart-to-code, UI-to-code, and slide-generation benchmarks (ChartMimic, Design2Code, and AeSlides), Visual-SDPO improves over the zero-shot base by more than 10 absolute points in the primary metric and over GRPO by at least 2.4 points, with fewer training steps and no added inference-time cost.
title_zh: 基于视觉反馈的自蒸馏策略优化：桥接代码与视觉产物
abstract_zh: 生成代码的大型语言模型（LLM）越来越多地通过编写由非可微渲染器执行的程序来生成图表、网页和幻灯片等视觉制品，它们在观察到渲染结果之前就确定了代码。因此，原本可执行的代码常常生成带有明显视觉缺陷的制品，包括元素重叠、文本裁剪、对齐错误、对比度低以及溢出。本文研究了面向代码生成视觉制品的视觉反馈自我蒸馏方法。我们提出了Visual-SDPO，一种自我蒸馏策略优化框架，该框架将渲染后的视觉反馈视为权重共享教师的特权上下文，并将这种反馈蒸馏给编码学生。为了使监督具有空间针对性而非均匀性，我们引入了视觉接地代码信用加权机制，该机制将每个检测到的缺陷追溯到影响相应元素的代码语句，并放大这些语句上的蒸馏信号。序列级GRPO（群体相对策略优化）项通过奖励可执行的、视觉质量高的生成结果来补充密集的令牌级目标，同时通过将执行错误作为特权上下文传递给教师，使得失败的执行在自我蒸馏路径中仍可学习。我们为图表、网页/用户界面和幻灯片生成实例化了Visual-SDPO，采用统一的Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct骨干网络。在图表到代码、用户界面到代码以及幻灯片生成基准测试（ChartMimic、Design2Code和AeSlides）中，Visual-SDPO在主要指标上比零样本基线提升超过10个绝对百分点，比GRPO提升至少2.4个百分点，且训练步骤更少，推理时无额外开销。

title: Early Comparative Evaluation of Transformer Models for Multilingual Software Vulnerability Detection
authors: Fiza Naseer, Javad Khan, Muhammad Yaqoob, Alexios Mylonas
abstract: Software vulnerability detection is increasingly important as modern applications combine multiple programming languages. This paper presents an early comparative evaluation of BERT, RoBERTa, and CodeBERT for binary vulnerability detection across HTML, Python, JavaScript, and PHP using the CVEFixes dataset and language-wise three-fold stratified cross-validation. The results show clear performance differences across languages, indicating that multilingual vulnerability detection requires more language-aware and robust transformer-based modelling strategies.
title_zh: Transformer模型在多语言软件漏洞检测中的早期比较评估
abstract_zh: 随着现代应用程序组合多种编程语言，软件漏洞检测变得日益重要。本文利用CVEFixes数据集，通过按语言划分的三折分层交叉验证，对BERT、RoBERTa和CodeBERT在HTML、Python、JavaScript和PHP上的二进制漏洞检测进行了早期比较评估。结果显示，不同语言间的性能存在显著差异，表明多语言漏洞检测需要更具语言感知能力和鲁棒性的基于Transformer的建模策略。

title: Attention-Discounted Adaptive Sampler for Masked Diffusion Language Models
authors: Yusuf Sahin, Ahmed Rockey Saikia, Volkan Cevher, Paolo Favaro
abstract: Masked diffusion language models can reduce inference steps by revealing multiple tokens per denoising iteration, but this parallelism is fragile: positions that are individually confident may be unsafe to commit together when their predictions are coupled. Existing training-free samplers such as Top-\(k\), Fast-dLLM, and EB-Sampler mainly control how many tokens to reveal, while often ranking candidates by token-wise scores that ignore interactions within the selected set. We propose ADAS, a training-free reranking rule for parallel masked diffusion decoding. ADAS leaves the base sampler's stopping rule unchanged and modifies only subset construction: it greedily discounts a candidate when it attends strongly to already selected positions whose predictions remain uncertain. Unlike graph-constrained methods that turn attention into hard compatibility constraints, ADAS keeps attention continuous and uses it as a soft marginal penalty. Across LLaDA-8B-Base and Dream-7B-Base on GSM8K, MATH500, HumanEval, and MBPP, plugging ADAS into Top-\(k\), Fast-dLLM, and EB-Sampler improves low-NFE performance at matched denoiser evaluations by \(9.11\) and \(10.46\) percentage points on average, respectively, with \(3.1\%\) per-forward runtime overhead. These results show that soft attention-discounted reranking is a simple and modular way to improve quality in highly parallel decoding for masked diffusion language models.
title_zh: 用于掩码扩散语言模型的注意力折扣自适应采样器
abstract_zh: 掩码扩散语言模型可以通过每次去噪迭代揭示多个token来减少推理步数，但这种并行性存在脆弱性：当预测存在耦合时，那些单独看来置信度高的位置可能并不安全地同时提交。现有免训练采样器（如Top-\(k\)、Fast-dLLM和EB-Sampler）主要控制揭示的token数量，同时通常基于忽略选定集合内相互作用的逐token得分对候选进行排序。我们提出ADAS，一种用于并行掩码扩散解码的免训练重新排序规则。ADAS保持基础采样器的停止规则不变，仅修改子集构建方式：它贪婪地对一个候选进行折扣，当该候选对已经选定但预测仍不确定的位置高度关注时。与将注意力转化为硬兼容性约束的图约束方法不同，ADAS保持注意力的连续性，并将其用作软边际惩罚。在GSM8K、MATH500、HumanEval和MBPP上，针对LLaDA-8B-Base和Dream-7B-Base，将ADAS插入Top-\(k\)、Fast-dLLM和EB-Sampler中，在匹配去噪器评估的情况下，低NFE性能平均分别提升9.11和10.46个百分点，每次前向推理的运行时开销仅为3.1%。这些结果表明，软注意力折扣重新排序是一种简单且模块化的方式，能够提升掩码扩散语言模型高度并行解码的质量。

title: Decentralized Multi-Agent Systems with Shared Context
authors: Yuzhen Mao, Azalia Mirhoseini
abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) can scale large language model reasoning at test time by decomposing complex problems into parallel subtasks. However, most existing MAS rely on centralized orchestration, where a main agent assigns work, collects outputs, and merges results. As the number of subtasks grows, this controller becomes a communication and integration bottleneck. We propose Decentralized Language Models (DeLM), a MAS framework that decentralizes coordination through parallel agents, a shared verified context, and a task queue. Agents asynchronously claim subtasks, read accumulated progress, perform local reasoning, and write back compact verified updates. The shared context acts as a common communication substrate, enabling agents to build on one another's verified progress without routing every update through a central controller. Empirically, DeLM improves both software-engineering test-time scaling and long-context reasoning. On SWE-bench Verified, DeLM achieves the best performance across Avg.@1, Pass@2, and Pass@4, with gains of up to 10.5 percentage points over the strongest baseline, while reducing cost per task by roughly 50%. On LongBench-v2 Multi-Doc QA, DeLM achieves the highest average accuracy across four frontier model families, improving over the strongest baseline by up to 5.7 percentage points. The code is available on our project website at https://yuzhenmao.github.io/DeLM/.
title_zh: 具有共享上下文的去中心化多智能体系统
abstract_zh: 多智能体系统（MAS）可在测试时通过将复杂问题分解为并行子任务，扩展大型语言模型的推理能力。然而，现有大多数MAS依赖集中式编排，即一个主智能体分配工作、收集输出并合并结果。随着子任务数量增长，这一控制器会成为通信与整合的瓶颈。我们提出去中心化语言模型（DeLM），这是一种通过并行智能体、共享验证上下文和任务队列实现去中心化协调的MAS框架。智能体异步认领子任务，读取累积进度，执行局部推理，并写回紧凑的已验证更新。共享上下文充当公共通信底层，使智能体能够基于彼此已验证的进展进行构建，而无需通过中央控制器路由每次更新。实证表明，DeLM在软件工程测试时扩展和长上下文推理两方面均有提升。在SWE-bench Verified上，DeLM在Avg.@1、Pass@2和Pass@4指标上均取得最佳性能，相比最强基线提升高达10.5个百分点，同时每个任务的成本降低约50%。在LongBench-v2多文档问答中，DeLM在四个前沿模型系列中取得了最高平均准确率，相比最强基线提升高达5.7个百分点。代码已发布于项目网站：https://yuzhenmao.github.io/DeLM/。

title: CIAware-Bench: Benchmarking Control Intervention Awareness Across Frontier LLMs
authors: Joachim Schaeffer, Thomas Jiralerspong, Alexander Panfilov, Guillaume Lajoie, Jonas Geiping, Yoshua Bengio, Roland S. Zimmermann
abstract: AI control protocols oversee untrusted models by monitoring their actions and modifying potentially unsafe steps, often using a trusted model. This partially tampers with the untrusted model's trajectory. If the trusted model detects such an intervention, it may infer properties of the monitor and adapt to evade control. We introduce \textbf{CIAware-Bench}, a benchmark for measuring \textbf{c}ontrol \textbf{i}ntervention (CI) awareness across frontier models. CIAware-Bench tests whether models can distinguish their own trajectories from those modified by a control intervention. The benchmark is comprised of a suite of four task domains (essay writing, BigCodeBench, Bash Arena, and SHADE-Arena), while varying trajectory watermarking, side-task presence, and the control protocol. Evaluating eleven frontier models, we find low to moderate CI awareness under default settings (up to 0.87; random chance balanced binary classification accuracy is 0.5) with substantial variation across task domains and model pairs. Detection is generally easier across model families, suggesting that models exploit provider-specific differences in style or post-training. Overall, CI awareness is not a fixed model-level property, and should be measured for each new model release and deployment scenario. We release CIAware-Bench to track CI awareness and inform control protocols whose interventions are harder to detect.
title_zh: CIAware基准：评估前沿大语言模型对控制干预的感知能力
abstract_zh: AI控制协议通过监控不可信模型的行为并修改其可能不安全的步骤（通常借助可信模型），来对不可信模型进行监督。这会在一定程度上篡改不可信模型的运行轨迹。若可信模型检测到此类干预，它可能推断出监控器的属性，并采取规避控制的适应性行为。我们提出\textbf{CIAware-Bench}基准——用于衡量前沿模型的\textbf{控制干预（CI）意识}。该基准测试模型能否区分自身轨迹与被控制干预修改后的轨迹。CIAware-Bench包含四个任务领域（论文写作、BigCodeBench、Bash Arena与SHADE-Arena），并同时变化轨迹水印、侧任务存在性及控制协议。通过对11个前沿模型的评估，我们发现默认设置下的CI意识处于低至中等水平（最高0.87；随机机会平衡二分类准确率为0.5），且不同任务领域及模型配对间存在显著差异。跨模型家族的检测通常更容易，这表明模型利用了供应商在风格或后训练方法上的差异。总体而言，CI意识并非固定的模型级属性，需针对每个新模型发布及部署场景进行测量。我们开源CIAware-Bench以追踪CI意识，并为设计更难以被检测的干预控制协议提供参考。

title: MIRAGE: A Polarity-Flipping Encoding Subspace in LLM Agents
authors: Pratibha Revankar, Kargi Chauhan, Jihye Kim, Sadiba Nusrat Nur, Vincent Siu, Chenguang Wang
abstract: When LLM agents are coerced into covertly encoding sensitive data (Base64, ROT13, acrostic, synonym chains, and beyond), the resulting outputs evade output-side detection but the underlying computation does not. Across nine encoding families and eight models from five architecture families, that computation is supported by a shared low-dimensional encoding subspace in the residual stream. A logistic-regression probe trained on eight encoding families recovers the held-out ninth at AUC 0.975-1.000, reading the computation rather than surface features. The same direction exhibits a second mechanistic signature at the planning token, flipping polarity to activate positively when the model will simulate the encoding inline and negatively when it will outsource it to a tool call, distinguishing two execution strategies before the encoded text exists. We build MIRAGE (Model-Internal Readout of Agentic Generation Exfiltration), a two-channel real-time monitor exploiting both signals. On 126 agentic exfiltration scenarios, it reaches AUC = 0.918, substantially outperforming output-only detection (AUC = 0.518). Monitor performance is fundamentally a property of the host model's geometry: benign-encoding false-positive rate ranges from 0% on Qwen-7B to 100% on Phi-3.5, revealing that the probe faithfully reads whether a model's geometry separates covert from overt encoding. Across all tested adversarial budgets, every attack suppressing the subspace also destroyed encoding fidelity, reported as an empirical regularity on the evaluated budgets, not a structural impossibility claim.
title_zh: MIRAGE：LLM智能体中的极性翻转编码子空间
abstract_zh: 当大语言模型代理被强制以隐蔽方式对敏感数据进行编码（如Base64、ROT13、藏头诗、同义词链等）时，其输出虽能规避输出端检测，但底层计算痕迹依然存在。在跨越五个架构家族的八个模型及九种编码家族中，这种计算由残差流中共享的低维编码子空间支撑。基于八种编码家族训练的逻辑回归探测器，能以AUC值0.975-1.000的精度恢复被排除的第九种编码——其读取的是计算逻辑而非表层特征。同一方向在规划令牌处呈现出第二种机制特征：当模型将在线模拟编码时极性翻转激活为正，当模型将编码外包给工具调用时则激活为负——在编码文本生成前即区分两种执行策略。我们构建了MIRAGE（模型内部读取代理生成式外泄信息）双通道实时监测系统，利用上述两种信号。在126个代理式外泄场景中，该系统达到AUC=0.918，显著优于仅依赖输出检测的基线方法（AUC=0.518）。监测性能本质上是宿主模型几何结构的属性：良性编码的假阳性率从Qwen-7B的0%到Phi-3.5的100%不等，表明探测器忠实反映了模型几何结构能否区分隐蔽编码与显式编码。在所有测试的对抗性预算下，任何抑制该子空间的攻击都会同时破坏编码保真度——此结论系基于所评估预算的经验规律，而非结构层面的不可能性论断。

title: The Linux IOCTL Census: A Source-Derived Database of the Linux Kernel Control-Code Surface
authors: Michael J. Bommarito
abstract: The ioctl system call is Linux's catch-all device-control interface. A userspace program opens a device node and hands the driver a numeric command code and an argument buffer, and the driver does whatever that code means, whether configuring hardware, reading back state, or moving data into and out of the kernel. Drivers define these commands themselves, by the thousand, and parse their arguments in kernel context, which makes ioctl handlers one of the broadest and least uniform local attack surfaces in the kernel. A handler that trusts an argument length it never validates can read or write kernel memory out of bounds, and the command space is catalogued in no central place. We present the Linux IOCTL Census, a source-derived and queryable inventory of that surface. An allmodconfig build compiles 878 modules across 169 subtrees, and over them a single deterministic libclang pass over the kernel source recovers 586 ioctl dispatch entry points, 1,289 decoded _IOC command codes, 3,583 controlled-input sinks, and 1,298 permission gates. A second pass encodes the kernel's own documented threat model as a queryable column, separating the capability-ungated ioctl surface, an upper bound on unprivileged reach rather than proven reach, from the part a hard capability gate puts out of scope. We backtest the census against 22 recent in-tree ioctl CVEs and release the structural tier as open data, on a schema shared with the companion Windows IOCTL Census so a single query spans both operating systems.
title_zh: Linux IOCTL普查：基于源码的Linux内核控制代码表面数据库
abstract_zh: ioctl 系统调用是 Linux 中通用的设备控制接口。用户空间程序打开设备节点，向驱动程序传递一个数值命令代码和一个参数缓冲区，而驱动程序则根据该代码的含义执行相应操作，无论是配置硬件、读取状态，还是在内核与用户空间之间传输数据。驱动程序自行定义这些命令，数量可达数千个，并在内核上下文中解析这些参数，这使得 ioctl 处理程序成为内核中最广泛且最不统一的本地面向攻击面之一。若某个处理程序信任其未经验证的参数长度，就可能越界读写内核内存，而命令空间也没有集中管理的目录。我们提出了 Linux IOCTL Census，这是一个基于源码且可查询的攻击面清单。通过 allmodconfig 构建，在 169 个子系统中编译了 878 个模块；在此基础上，对内核源码执行一次确定的 libclang 遍历，恢复了 586 个 ioctl 分发入口点、1,289 个已解码的 _IOC 命令代码、3,583 个受控输入接收点以及 1,298 个权限门控。第二次遍历将内核自身文档化的威胁模型编码为可查询的列，将未受能力门控的 ioctl 攻击面（这是非特权用户可触达范围的上界，而非经过验证的可触达范围）与由硬能力门控排除在外的部分区分开来。我们使用近期 22 个内核树内 ioctl CVE 对该普查进行回测，并将结构层作为开放数据发布，其模式与配套的 Windows IOCTL Census 共享，从而允许单次查询跨越两个操作系统。

title: Securing Code Understanding: Detecting Natural Backdoor Vulnerability in Code Language Models
authors: Yuchen Chen, Weisong Sun, Haocheng Huang, Yuan Xiao, Chunrong Fang, Yiran Zhang, Tingting Xu, Zhenpeng Chen, An Guo, Peizhuo Lv, Xiaofang Zhang, Zhenyu Chen, Yang Liu, Baowen Xu
abstract: Code Language Models (CodeLMs) have become integral to software engineering, significantly advancing code intelligence tasks. However, their widespread adoption has raised critical security concerns, particularly regarding susceptibility to backdoor attacks. Recent studies have uncovered naturally occurring backdoors, referred to as natural backdoors, in normally trained deep learning models. Despite posing threats as serious as those introduced through data poisoning, security implications of natural backdoor vulnerabilities in CodeLMs remain poorly understood. In this paper, we conduct a thorough empirical study of natural backdoor vulnerabilities in CodeLMs across various model architectures and code intelligence tasks. Specifically, we examine potential natural backdoor vulnerabilities across 44 scenarios, demonstrating that natural backdoors are prevalent and intrinsic to CodeLMs. We reveal differences between injected and natural backdoor vulnerabilities at both the model and parameter levels. We then analyze the transferability of natural backdoor vulnerabilities from three perspectives: datasets, model architectures, and shared knowledge. We further investigate the causes of natural backdoors from two aspects: training datasets and the model training procedure. We evaluate existing backdoor defense techniques, including pre-training, in-training, and post-training defenses, in mitigating natural backdoors. Finally, we propose ScanNBT, a novel detection method designed to improve comprehensive detection of natural backdoor vulnerabilities in CodeLMs. We aim for our findings to enhance understanding of these vulnerabilities and provide insights for strengthening CodeLM security against backdoor threats.
title_zh: 保障代码理解安全：在代码语言模型中检测自然后门漏洞
abstract_zh: 代码语言模型（CodeLMs）已成为软件工程的重要组成部分，显著推进了代码智能任务的发展。然而，其广泛应用引发了严重的安全问题，尤其是在后门攻击的易感性方面。近期研究揭示了正常训练的深度学习模型中存在自然出现的后门，称为自然后门。尽管这些后门与通过数据投毒引入的后门威胁同样严重，但CodeLMs中自然后门漏洞的安全影响尚不明确。本文针对不同模型架构和代码智能任务下的CodeLMs，对其自然后门漏洞开展了深入的实证研究。具体而言，我们考察了44个场景中潜在的自然后门漏洞，证明自然后门在CodeLMs中普遍存在且具有内在性。我们在模型层面和参数层面揭示了注入后门与自然后门漏洞之间的差异。随后，我们从数据集、模型架构和共享知识三个角度分析了自然后门漏洞的可迁移性。我们进一步从训练数据集和模型训练过程两个方面探究了自然后门的成因。我们评估了现有后门防御技术（包括预训练防御、训练中防御和训练后防御）在缓解自然后门方面的有效性。最后，我们提出ScanNBT，一种旨在改进CodeLMs中自然后门漏洞全面检测的新型检测方法。我们希望我们的发现能增强对这些漏洞的理解，并为增强CodeLMs抵御后门威胁的安全性提供见解。

title: AutoPDE: Reliable Agentic PDE Solving via Explicitly Represented Solver Strategies
authors: Huanshuo Dong, Keyao Zhang, Hong Wang, Zhezheng Hao, Zhiwei Zhuang, Ziyan Liu, Jiacong Wang, Gengyuan Liu, Xin Jin
abstract: Numerical solvers for partial differential equations (PDEs) are core computational tools in science and engineering. Building reliable PDE solvers requires not only executable code, but a numerical solver strategy, a set of decisions about discretization, stabilization, solver configuration, and resolution control, that matches the PDE structure. Recent LLM-based coding agents have begun to reduce the programming burden by generating and debugging solver implementations. However, they typically move directly from a PDE problem to solver code, leaving the solver strategy implicit in implementation details. Feedback from a failed solve is therefore routed back to code edits rather than to the underlying strategy, so numerical decisions remain hard to check before code is generated and hard to revise using numerical evidence when it fails. To address this limitation, we propose AutoPDE, a code agent that maintains the solver strategy as an explicitly represented object throughout the solving process: an independent, inspectable object that is built before any code is written and can be revised, using numerical evidence, whenever a solve fails. AutoPDE builds and maintains this object in three stages, all drawing from a library of reusable PDE-solving skills: PDE analysis identifies the equation type and algebraic structure; numerical method selection chooses a numerical method that matches the analysis result and commits to a discretization, stabilization, and linear solver accordingly; and adaptive tuning runs low-cost pilot solves to calibrate resolution and tolerances under the prescribed accuracy and runtime budget. We evaluate AutoPDE on the PDE Agent Bench, where experimental results show that AutoPDE achieves a pass rate of $54.5%$, improving over the strongest baseline by $14.2$ percentage points.
title_zh: AutoPDE：通过显式表示的求解器策略实现可靠的智能体偏微分方程求解
abstract_zh: 偏微分方程（PDE）的数值求解器是科学与工程领域的核心计算工具。构建可靠的PDE求解器不仅需要可执行的代码，还需要一套数值求解策略——涵盖离散化、稳定化、求解器配置和分辨率控制等决策——且该策略需与PDE结构相匹配。近年来，基于大语言模型（LLM）的编码代理已通过自动生成和调试求解器实现来减轻编程负担。然而，这些代理通常直接从PDE问题跳转到求解器代码，将求解策略隐含在实现细节中。因此，求解失败时的反馈被导向代码修改，而非底层策略，导致数值决策在代码生成前难以核查，且在失败时难以利用数值证据进行修正。为解决这一局限，我们提出AutoPDE——一个在求解过程中将求解策略作为显式表示对象进行维护的编码代理：该对象独立、可检查，在编写任何代码前构建，并在求解失败时可根据数值证据进行修订。AutoPDE通过三个阶段构建并维护该对象，所有阶段均利用可复用的PDE求解技能库：PDE分析识别方程类型与代数结构；数值方法选择根据分析结果匹配相应方法，并据此确定离散化、稳定化及线性求解器；自适应调优在指定精度和运行时间预算下，通过低成本的预求解校准分辨率与容差。我们在PDE Agent Benchmark上评估了AutoPDE，实验结果显示其通过率达到54.5%，较最强基线提升14.2个百分点。

title: DarkAgents
authors: Michele Lucente, Silvia Pascoli, Filippo Sala, Matteo Zandi
abstract: We present DarkAgents: a multi-agent system that leverages the reasoning and code-generation capabilities of large language models (LLMs), together with deterministic tested human-written code, to build orchestrated pipelines for theoretical astroparticle physics research. While related approaches have been proposed in collider physics and cosmology, DarkAgents targets the specific challenges of this domain, such as model building, complex pipeline computations, multiple constraints and assumption auditing. The framework can be powered by different agentic command-line tools, including Mistral's, Anthropic's, OpenAI's and local LLMs via Ollama. As first implementation, we apply DarkAgents to the study of cosmological first order transitions, starting from a classically scale-invariant particle-physics model and ending with the fit to the NANOGrav nanohertz gravitational-waves spectrum. DarkAgent-PT provides as output i) the best-fit values of model parameters, ii) their existing experimental and observational constraints, iii) an audit report of the assumptions and priors entering both i) and ii), of particular relevance for astroparticle physics. Our test runs identify inconsistencies in some fits in the literature and produce novel ones based on the dissipative bulk-flow GW template. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/PhysicsZandi/DarkAgents.
title_zh: 黑暗特工
abstract_zh: 我们介绍DarkAgents：一个多智能体系统，它利用大语言模型（LLM）的推理和代码生成能力，结合经过确定性测试的人工编写代码，为理论天体粒子物理研究构建编排管道。虽然在碰撞粒子物理和宇宙学中已有类似方法被提出，但DarkAgents针对该领域的特定挑战，例如模型构建、复杂管道计算、多重约束和假设审计。该框架可由不同的智能命令行工具驱动，包括Mistral、Anthropic、OpenAI以及通过Ollama运行的本地LLM。作为首次实现，我们将DarkAgents应用于宇宙学一级相变的研究，从经典尺度不变的粒子物理模型出发，最终拟合NANOGrav纳赫兹引力波谱。DarkAgent-PT输出：i) 模型参数的最佳拟合值，ii) 它们现有的实验和观测约束，iii) 针对进入i)和ii)的假设和先验的审计报告，这对天体粒子物理尤为重要。我们的测试运行发现了文献中一些拟合的不一致性，并基于耗散体流引力波模板生成了新的拟合。代码公开于https://github.com/PhysicsZandi/DarkAgents。

title: Towards Autonomous Accelerator Design: FPGA Accelerator Generation with SECDA
authors: Vinamra Sharma, Xingjian Fu, Jude Haris, José Cano
abstract: Designing FPGA-based accelerators for modern artificial intelligence workloads requires exploring a large and complex hardware design space that involves architectural parameters, data flow strategies, and memory hierarchies, making the process very time consuming. While existing methodologies such as SECDA enable rapid hardware-software co-design through SystemC simulation and FPGA execution, identifying efficient accelerator configurations remains a largely manual process requiring extensive domain knowledge. SECDA-DSE is a framework that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) into the SECDA ecosystem to guide design space exploration (DSE) of FPGA-based accelerators. It combines a structured DSE Explorer for generating candidate architectures with an LLM Stack that performs reasoning-guided exploration using retrieval-augmented generation and chain-of-thought prompting, coupled with a feedback loop for iterative and reinforced refinement. Building on our previous work introducing SECDA-DSE, this paper extends its evaluation by generating three accelerator designs, including element-wise vector multiplication, 2D convolution, and matrix transpose, and performing end-to-end execution on FPGA hardware. The results show that SECDA-DSE can generate SECDA-compliant accelerator designs that are successfully synthesized and executed on FPGA hardware. Furthermore, the generated designs capture kernel-specific trade-offs between compute parallelism and data movement, highlighting the potential of LLM-guided exploration to adapt architectural configurations across diverse workloads while reducing exploration time and the need for extensive human expertise.
title_zh: 面向自主加速器设计：基于SECDA的FPGA加速器生成
abstract_zh: 设计基于FPGA的加速器以应对现代人工智能工作负载时，需要探索一个庞大且复杂的硬件设计空间，涉及架构参数、数据流策略和存储层次结构，这使得过程极为耗时。尽管SECDA等现有方法可通过SystemC仿真和FPGA执行实现软硬件快速协同设计，但识别高效的加速器配置仍主要依赖人工操作，需要大量领域专业知识。SECDA-DSE是一个将大语言模型（LLM）集成到SECDA生态系统的框架，用于指导基于FPGA的加速器设计空间探索（DSE）。它结合了用于生成候选架构的结构化DSE探索器，以及通过检索增强生成和思维链提示进行推理引导探索的LLM堆栈，并配有反馈回路实现迭代强化优化。本文在先前介绍SECDA-DSE工作的基础上扩展了评估，生成了三种加速器设计（包括逐元素向量乘法、二维卷积和矩阵转置），并在FPGA硬件上完成了端到端执行。结果表明，SECDA-DSE能够生成符合SECDA标准的加速器设计，并成功在FPGA硬件上完成综合与执行。此外，所生成的设计捕捉了计算并行性与数据移动之间的核特异性权衡，突显了LLM引导的探索在跨不同工作负载调整架构配置、减少探索时间及降低对人类专业知识依赖方面的潜力。

title: Frontier Coding Agents Use Metaprogramming to Adapt to Unfamiliar Programming Languages
authors: Aman Sharma, Sushrut Thorat, Paras Chopra
abstract: LLM-based coding agents are usually evaluated in familiar software settings: mainstream languages, common libraries, and public repositories. These benchmarks remain important, but they can hide how agents behave when the language itself is unfamiliar. We evaluate six contemporary coding agents on four esoteric programming languages using a sequential setup with file editing, local execution, and hidden-test grading. Our protocol exposes capability differences between these agents that mainstream coding and agentic benchmarks such as SWE-Bench Verified and Terminal-Bench 2.0 compress into much narrower bands. We observe that the strongest agents, Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.4 xhigh, often avoid writing the target language directly. On Brainfuck and Befunge-98, they write Python programs that generate target-language code and debug those generators locally. Forbidding this metaprogramming strategy causes large performance drops. Text guidance distilled from this strategy does not materially improve weaker agents. In contrast, Opus-derived Python helper code for building generators, with no solved benchmark programs or hidden-test answers, sharply improves Sonnet 4.6 and GPT-5.4 mini on the same problems, while Haiku 4.5 remains low. More interpreter calls and output tokens improve stronger agents but leave weaker agents near their original performance, indicating that these resources amplify useful strategies rather than create them. Together, these results show that strong coding agents adapt to unfamiliar languages by using tools, feedback, and workspace state to build a working model of the target language. Metaprogramming is the clearest case, but the broader gap is constructing and debugging a strategy that works under the target language's rules.
title_zh: 前沿编码代理利用元编程适应不熟悉的编程语言
abstract_zh: 基于大型语言模型的编码代理通常在熟悉的软件环境下进行评估：主流语言、常见库和公共代码仓库。这些基准测试仍然重要，但它们可能掩盖了当语言本身不熟悉时代理的行为。我们使用一个包含文件编辑、本地执行和隐藏测试评分的顺序设置，在四种深奥的编程语言上评估了六个当代编码代理。我们的协议揭示了这些代理之间的能力差异，而这些差异在主流编码和代理基准测试（如SWE-Bench Verified和Terminal-Bench 2.0）中被压缩到非常窄的范围内。我们观察到，最强的代理——Claude Opus 4.6和GPT-5.4 xhigh——往往避免直接编写目标语言。在Brainfuck和Befunge-98上，它们编写生成目标语言代码的Python程序，并在本地调试这些生成器。禁止这种元编程策略会导致性能大幅下降。从该策略中提取的文字指导并不能实质性改善较弱的代理。相比之下，Opus派生的用于构建生成器的Python辅助代码（不包含已解决的基准程序或隐藏测试答案）显著提高了Sonnet 4.6和GPT-5.4 mini在相同问题上的表现，而Haiku 4.5仍然表现较低。更多的解释器调用和输出令牌改善了较强的代理，但使较弱的代理接近其原始性能，这表明这些资源放大了已有的有效策略，而非创造策略。这些结果共同表明，强大的编码代理通过使用工具、反馈和工作区状态来构建目标语言的工作模型，从而适应不熟悉的语言。元编程是最明显的案例，但更广泛的差距在于构建和调试一个能在目标语言规则下运作的策略。

title: Max-Policy Iteration, Revisited
authors: David Monniaux, Helmut Seidl
abstract: Max-policy iteration is an approach to computing precise numeric program invariants by successive attempts at resolving maximum operators and reduction to mathematical optimization. Mathematical optimization, though, may be expensive. Here, we show, for max-policy iteration on systems of equations over integers as well as over floating point numbers, that mathematical optimization can be replaced by plain value iteration -- which is still guaranteed to terminate. As an application, a precise bound analysis for integer or floating point variables is obtained, avoiding widening operators altogether. We also consider max-policy iteration over the rational numbers, where the right-hand sides are maxima of minima of affine combinations of unknowns. We propose min-policy iteration as an alternative to linear programming for solving the optimization problems posed by max-policy iteration. We prove that max-min policy iteration is guaranteed to return the least solution for bounded systems. We also show how to extend this algorithm to unbounded systems, and how to construct certificates of soundness as well as of optimality of the computed results.
title_zh: 最大策略迭代，再探
abstract_zh: 最大策略迭代是一种通过不断尝试解析最大值运算符并归约为数学优化来计算精确数值程序不变量的方法。然而，数学优化可能代价高昂。在此，我们表明，对于整数和浮点数方程系统上的最大策略迭代，数学优化可以被普通的值迭代所取代——且仍能保证终止。作为一种应用，可以获得对整数或浮点变量的精确边界分析，完全避免了扩展运算符。我们还考虑了有理数上的最大策略迭代，其中右侧是未知数的仿射组合的最小值的最大值。我们提出最小策略迭代作为线性规划的替代方案，用于解决最大策略迭代所提出的优化问题。我们证明，最大-最小策略迭代保证为有界系统返回最小解。我们还展示了如何将该算法扩展到无界系统，以及如何构建计算结果正确性和最优性的证书。

title: 3D-CoS: A New 3D Reconstruction Paradigm Based on VLM Code Synthesis
authors: Yuhao Wang, Puyi Wang, Linjie Li, Zhengyuan Yang, Kevin Qinghong Lin, Yu Cheng
abstract: Most recent 3D reconstruction and editing systems operate on implicit and explicit representations such as NeRF, point clouds, or meshes. While these representations enable high-fidelity rendering, they are fundamentally low-level and hard to control programmatically. In contrast, we propose and systematically evaluate a new 3D reconstruction paradigm, 3D Code Synthesis (3D-CoS), where 3D assets are constructed as executable Blender code, a programmatic and interpretable medium. To assess how well current VLMs can use code to represent 3D objects, we evaluate representative open-source and closed-source VLMs in code-based reconstruction under a unified protocol. We further introduce a suite of structured code-synthesis workflows, including blueprint-based planning, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) over Blender API documentation, few-shot geometric demonstrations, and a component-level Agent workflow for part-wise code generation. To demonstrate the unique advantages of this representation, we further evaluate localized text-driven modifications and compare our code-based edits with a point-cloud-based 3D editing baseline. Our study shows that code as a 3D representation offers strong controllability and locality, yielding stronger edit fidelity and better preservation of unedited regions in our targeted editing evaluation. Our work also analyzes the potential of this paradigm, delineates the current capability frontier of VLMs for programmatic 3D modeling, and highlights code synthesis as a promising direction for editable 3D reconstruction.
title_zh: 3D-CoS：一种基于VLM代码合成的全新3D重建范式
abstract_zh: 最新的3D重建与编辑系统通常基于隐式或显式表示，如NeRF、点云或网格。尽管这些表示能够实现高保真渲染，但它们本质上是低层次的，难以通过编程方式控制。相比之下，我们提出并系统评估了一种新的3D重建范式——3D代码合成（3D-CoS），其中3D资产被构造为可执行的Blender代码，这是一种可编程且可解释的媒介。为了评估当前视觉-语言模型（VLM）利用代码表示3D对象的能力，我们在统一的协议下，对具有代表性的开源和闭源VLM进行了基于代码的重建评估。此外，我们引入了一套结构化代码合成工作流程，包括基于蓝图的设计规划、面向Blender API文档的检索增强生成（RAG）、少样本几何演示，以及用于逐部件代码生成的组件级智能体工作流。为展示这种表示的独特优势，我们进一步评估了局部文本驱动的修改，并将基于代码的编辑与基于点云的3D编辑基线进行了比较。研究表明，代码作为一种3D表示方式，具备强大的可控制性和局部性，在目标编辑评估中实现了更强的编辑保真度，并更好地保留了未编辑区域。我们的工作还分析了这一范式的潜力，描绘了当前VLM在程序化3D建模方面的能力边界，并强调代码合成是面向可编辑3D重建的一个有前景方向。

title: RECON: An LLM-Enhanced Backward Constraint Analysis Framework
authors: Babangida Bappah, Lamine Noureddine, Umar Farooq, Aisha Ali-Gombe
abstract: While traditional techniques, such as symbolic execution, provide a principled foundation for precise constraint reasoning in program analysis, they struggle to scale to modern software systems mainly due to path explosion, the need for function modeling, and the loss of semantic intent at low-level program representations. In complex execution environments such as Android, characterized by extensive framework interactions and event-driven behavior, these limitations are even more amplified. Thus, in this paper, we present a novel large language model (LLM)-enhanced backward constraint analysis framework that combines the precision of static program analysis with LLM's semantic understanding to extract precise execution constraints from Android bytecode. Our approach, titled RECON, performs backward path discovery from target method(s) to the application entry point(s), discovers method-level control-flow constraints, and leverages LLM reasoning to transform bytecode conditions into interpretable specifications. We evaluated RECON using five LLMs across 78 Android constraint-extraction scenarios and compared it with traditional symbolic execution on real-world applications. Results demonstrate that our approach operates 5.8X faster than traditional symbolic execution, with a 100% success rate, while maintaining logical equivalence and providing significantly more precise and interpretable output. We further evaluated RECON for malware analysis on 100 samples. The results indicate an 84% success rate in generating semantic constraints that lead to the execution of dangerous API behaviors and in detecting complex constraints across multiple execution paths.
title_zh: RECON：一种大语言模型增强的后向约束分析框架
abstract_zh: 尽管传统技术（如符号执行）为程序分析中的精确约束推理提供了原理性基础，但它们在扩展到现代软件系统时面临挑战，主要由于路径爆炸、函数建模需求以及底层程序表示中语义意图的缺失。在诸如Android等复杂执行环境中，由于存在大量框架交互和事件驱动行为，这些局限性更为突出。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的大语言模型增强后向约束分析框架，该框架结合了静态程序分析的精确性与大语言模型的语义理解能力，从Android字节码中提取精确的执行约束。我们的方法名为RECON，从目标方法向后追踪至应用程序入口点，发现方法级控制流约束，并利用大语言模型推理将字节码条件转化为可解释的规约。我们使用五个大语言模型在78个Android约束提取场景中评估了RECON，并与真实世界应用程序中的传统符号执行进行了对比。结果表明，我们的方法运行速度比传统符号执行快5.8倍，成功率达到100%，同时保持了逻辑等价性，并提供了显著更精确和可解释的输出。我们还进一步评估了RECON在100个样本上的恶意软件分析能力。结果显示，在生成导致危险API行为执行的语义约束以及检测跨多个执行路径的复杂约束方面，成功率达到84%。

title: Watts and Debts of Agentic Frameworks: An Empirical Study (Registered Report)
authors: Aneetta Sara Shany, Chandrasekar S, Karthik Vaidhyanathan
abstract: Context: Every agentic AI system shipped to production carries two hidden risks: accumulated Technical Debt (TD) and unmonitored runtime energy costs. While functional benchmarking is common, the empirical link between internal structural quality (specifically TD) and dynamic energy consumption during execution remains unexplored, creating a blind spot for practitioners and organizations managing sustainability and operational budgets at scale. Goal: We propose a confirmatory empirical study correlating Self-Admitted Technical Debt (SATD) with hardware-level runtime energy consumption across agentic frameworks, to determine whether code quality can drive energy-aware design decisions. Method: We will evaluate five open-source agentic frameworks by executing a standardized task suite in a strictly controlled environment. SATD will be extracted via automated Python-based comment mining and categorized via LLM-based classification using fine-tuned prompt, while runtime energy will be measured at the hardware level. Our study will investigate three core research questions: (RQ1) the presence of TD within these frameworks; (RQ2) the variance in runtime energy consumption across architectures; and (RQ3) the statistical correlation between a framework's TD and its task-level energy consumption. Conclusion: The findings will establish whether automated source code analysis can serve as a reliable, early-warning proxy for energy-efficient framework selection, thereby advancing both green software engineering and agentic AI quality research.
title_zh: 代理框架的功率与债务：一项实证研究（注册报告）
abstract_zh: 上下文：每个投入生产的智能体AI系统都隐藏着两种风险：累积的技术债务（TD）与未受监控的运行时能耗成本。尽管功能基准测试很常见，但内部结构质量（特别是技术债务）与执行期间动态能耗之间的经验性联系至今仍未被探索，这为管理大规模可持续性和运营预算的实践者及组织造成了盲区。目标：我们提出一项确认性实证研究，旨在关联智能体框架中的自我承认的技术债务（SATD）与硬件级别的运行时能耗，以确定代码质量能否驱动能源感知的设计决策。方法：我们将通过在一个严格受控的环境中执行标准化任务集，对五个开源智能体框架进行评估。通过基于Python的自动注释挖掘提取SATD，并利用基于微调提示的大语言模型分类进行归类，同时硬件级别测量运行时能耗。本研究将探讨三个核心研究问题：（RQ1）这些框架中是否存在技术债务；（RQ2）不同架构间运行时能耗的差异；（RQ3）框架的技术债务与其任务级能耗之间的统计相关性。结论：研究结果将确定自动化源代码分析能否作为节能框架选择的可靠早期预警代理，从而推进绿色软件工程与智能体AI质量研究。

title: Flaws in the LLM Automation Narrative
authors: George Perrett, Javae Elliott, Jennifer Hill, Marc Scott
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly described as performing at the level of human experts on knowledge economy tasks. These claims are primarily based on how LLMs perform on benchmarking tasks that measure average performance across standardized datasets. Primary limitations of many benchmarking tasks are that they often measure performance based on content directly included in LLM training data, and they frequently do not assess the reliability of LLM performance or the magnitude of LLM errors. However, in high stakes contexts, these qualities are critically important. Through a novel LLM benchmarking task that requires writing computer code to complete a data analysis task, we compare the performance of a frontier LLM against submissions from human experts and explicitly measure the variance of responses and the magnitude of errors. Our study reveals that the human experts perform better on average on a range of metrics and demonstrate less variability in performance. Our results provide evidence that LLMs do not consistently perform at the level of human experts and demonstrate the importance of measuring variance and assessing error magnitude in LLM benchmark evaluations.
title_zh: LLM自动化叙事的缺陷
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在知识经济任务中日益被描述为达到人类专家水平的表现。这些说法主要基于LLMs在标准化数据集上衡量平均性能的基准测试中的表现。许多基准测试的主要局限性在于：它们通常基于直接包含在LLM训练数据中的内容来评估性能，且往往不评估LLM性能的可靠性或误差幅度。然而在高风险场景中，这些特质至关重要。通过一项需要编写计算机代码完成数据分析任务的新型LLM基准测试，我们比较了前沿LLM与人类专家提交成果的表现，并明确测量了响应的方差和误差幅度。我们的研究表明，在多项指标上人类专家平均表现更优，且性能变异程度更低。本研究结果证明，LLMs并未始终达到人类专家水平，同时揭示了在LLM基准评估中测量方差和评估误差幅度的重要性。

title: OpenRTLSet: A Fully Open-Source Dataset for Large Language Model-based Verilog Module Design
authors: Jinghua Wang, Lily Jiaxin Wan, Sanjana Pingali, Scott Smith, Manvi Jha, Shalini Sivakumar, Xing Zhao, Kaiwen Cao, Deming Chen
abstract: OpenRTLSet introduces the largest fully open-source dataset for hardware design, offering over 131,000 diverse Verilog code samples to the research community and industry. Our dataset uniquely combines Verilog code from GitHub repositories (102k modules), VHDL translations (5k modules), and synthesizable C/C++ translations (24k modules), all freely accessible without proprietary restrictions. Using the reasoning model DeepSeek-R1, we generated paired natural language descriptions for each code sample, enabling fine-tuning of various language model families (e.g., Qwen and Granite) for Verilog code generation. Our dataset explores multiple options, including Verilator-generated C++ files as additional context during labeling, quantization techniques (INT4 vs. BF16), and performance differences across model sizes (7B-32B parameters). OpenRTLSet demonstrates that open-source approaches can achieve superior performance in hardware design tasks, establishing a new foundation for accessible research and commercial use in this domain.
title_zh: OpenRTLSet: 一个完全开源的数据集，用于基于大型语言模型的Verilog模块设计
abstract_zh: OpenRTLSet 推出了迄今为止最全面的开源硬件设计数据集，为研究界和工业界提供了超过13.1万个多样化的 Verilog 代码样本。该数据集独特地整合了来自 GitHub 仓库的 Verilog 代码（10.2万个模块）、VHDL 翻译（0.5万个模块）以及可综合的 C/C++ 翻译（2.4万个模块），所有内容均免费开放，不受专有限制。我们利用推理模型 DeepSeek-R1，为每个代码样本生成了配对的自然语言描述，从而能够对各种语言模型系列（如 Qwen 和 Granite）进行微调，以生成 Verilog 代码。该数据集探索了多种选项，包括在标注过程中将 Verilator 生成的 C++ 文件作为额外上下文、量化技术（INT4 与 BF16）以及不同模型规模（7B-32B 参数）之间的性能差异。OpenRTLSet 证明了开源方法在硬件设计任务中能够实现卓越性能，为该领域内的可访问研究和商业应用奠定了新基础。

title: Arithmetic Packing on Wide Integer Datapaths in DSP Primitives of Modern FPGA Devices
authors: Titus Bornträger, Shane Fleming, Philipp Holzinger, Dietmar Fey, Michaela Blott, Thomas B. Preußer
abstract: Deep Neural Networks increasingly employ low-precision quantization to reduce computational requirements. While FPGAs are well suited for workloads with heterogeneous precisions, their dedicated digital signal processing (DSP) slices only feature fixed-width datapaths that are significantly underutilized by low-bitwidth arithmetic. While previous approaches have already introduced the packing of multiple values onto the same wide DSP datapath, they either only support specific fixed bitwidths or are wasteful regarding the use of additional support logic external to the DSP. This paper proposes an efficient method to dynamically pack multiple (un-)signed inputs with arbitrary bitwidths into a wide multiplier path by leveraging the DSP's internal pre-adder. Building on this, we present two distinct architectures, one optimized for matrix-vector multiplications and the other for convolutions. Our implementations are integrated into AMD's FINN framework. With these optimizations, we reduce the LUT utilization by 21% and increase the FPS/DSP by 36% for the UltraNet model compared to the FINN reference.
title_zh: 现代FPGA器件DSP原语中宽整数数据路径上的算术打包
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络越来越多地采用低精度量化来降低计算需求。尽管FPGA非常适合处理混合精度的工作负载，但其专用的数字信号处理（DSP）切片仅具有固定宽度的数据路径，在低比特宽度的算术运算中利用率显著不足。此前已有研究提出将多个数值打包到同一宽DSP数据路径上，但这些方法要么仅支持特定的固定比特宽度，要么在DSP外部使用额外支持逻辑时造成资源浪费。本文提出了一种高效方法，通过利用DSP内部的预加法器，将多个（无符号/有符号）具有任意比特宽度的输入动态打包到宽乘法器路径中。基于此，我们提出了两种不同的架构：一种针对矩阵向量乘法进行优化，另一种则针对卷积运算。我们的实现已集成到AMD的FINN框架中。通过上述优化，与FINN参考实现相比，UltraNet模型的LUT利用率降低了21%，每秒帧数/DSP提升了36%。

title: Making Software Meaningful
authors: Eagon Meng, Abutalib Namazov, Carmel Schare, Alcino Cunha, Daniel Jackson
abstract: Adopting a single measure can improve the usability, modularity and accountability of software: a commitment to explicit meaning. This entails constructing and agreeing upon a representation of the behavior of the software, as observed in the domain of application. The phenomena comprising this behavior become a vocabulary that grounds all discourse about the software, among all stakeholders, and for all artifacts and activities. These phenomena are individuals; actions they participate in; and facts that result from actions. They can be organized, by partitioning the set of actions, into concepts, offering larger units of meaning. Examples of exploiting meaning are given in three areas: designing for usability (by aligning user and designer on a single shared meaning); generating modular code with LLMs (by mapping units of meaning to units of code, achieving not only modularity but also legibility); and making agents accountable (by having them adhere to a code of conduct that defines their intended behavior).
title_zh: 让软件有意义
abstract_zh: 采用单一措施即可提升软件的可用性、模块化和可问责性：即对显式含义的承诺。这需要构建并达成共识，以应用程序领域所观察到的软件行为表征为基础。组成这一行为的现象将成为一套词汇，从而在所有利益相关者之间，以及针对所有工件和活动，奠定所有关于软件讨论的基础。这些现象包括：个体、个体参与的动作，以及动作产生的事实。通过划分动作集，这些现象可被组织成概念，提供更大的意义单元。本文从三个方面给出了利用含义的示例：面向可用性的设计（通过让用户和设计者对齐到同一共享含义）；利用大语言模型生成模块化代码（通过将意义单元映射到代码单元，不仅实现模块化，还提升了可读性）；以及实现智能体的可问责性（通过使其遵守定义预期行为的行为准则）。

title: A Constrained Natural-Language Interface for Variational Multi-Physics Finite Element Simulations in FEniCS
authors: Nilay Upadhyay, Wesley F. Reinhart
abstract: Large language models can reduce the manual effort required to set up finite element simulations, but they introduce reliability risks when generated solver code lies on the critical path. We present a constrained natural-language interface for multi-physics finite element analysis in which the LLM is limited to front-end tasks: parsing prompts into structured JSON, generating Gmsh code only for non-catalog geometries, and using retry feedback for those stages. It never writes FEniCS solver templates, derives weak forms, or writes the numerical solver core. A deterministic dispatcher maps the validated specification to five human-written FEniCS/UFL templates: linear elasticity, hyperelasticity, elastoplasticity, thermo-mechanical coupling, and phase-field fracture. We validate this deterministic template layer against analytical solutions and published 2D/3D benchmarks. Smooth cases reach sub-percent agreement on adequate meshes, while harder nonlinear cases reach the 2-5 percent range. We also evaluate the LLM-facing front end directly. In a 15-prompt parser benchmark, first-pass valid parses were obtained for 9 cases, and all remaining cases were repaired after retry, giving a final valid parse rate of 100.0 percent, 100.0 percent problem-class accuracy, and 97.1 percent field-extraction accuracy. In a 10-case custom-geometry benchmark routed through the real LLM-to-Gmsh path, first-pass and final success were both 90.0 percent, with one unrecovered invalid-geometry failure. These results show that the parser and constrained prompt/validation design are effective on these benchmarks. As an end-to-end demonstration, the system generates and analyzes a 3D elastoplastic L-bracket with a fillet and bolt hole from one natural-language prompt. The contribution is a measured architecture for natural-language-driven variational simulation, not open-ended autonomous code generation.
title_zh: FEniCS中用于变分多物理场有限元模拟的受约束自然语言接口
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型可以减少建立有限元仿真所需的手动工作量，但当生成的求解器代码处于关键路径时，会引入可靠性风险。我们提出了一种用于多物理场有限元分析的受限自然语言界面，其中LLM仅限用于前端任务：将提示解析为结构化的JSON，仅对非目录几何体生成Gmsh代码，并针对这些阶段使用重试反馈。它从不编写FEniCS求解器模板、推导弱形式或编写数值求解器核心。一个确定性调度器将验证后的规范映射到五个由人工编写的FEniCS/UFL模板：线性弹性、超弹性、弹塑性、热-力耦合和相场断裂。我们针对解析解和已发表的2D/3D基准对该确定性模板层进行了验证。在适当网格上，平滑情况达到低于1%的一致性，而较难的非线性情况在2-5%范围内。我们还直接评估了面向LLM的前端。在15个提示的解析器基准测试中，首次通过有效解析获得了9个案例，其余案例在重试后均被修复，最终有效解析率达到100.0%，问题类别准确率100.0%，字段提取准确率97.1%。在通过实际LLM到Gmsh路径路由的10个自定义几何体基准测试中，首次和最终成功率均为90.0%，一次未恢复的无效几何体失败。这些结果表明，解析器和受限提示/验证设计在这些基准测试中有效。作为端到端演示，该系统根据一个自然语言提示生成并分析了带有圆角和螺栓孔的3D弹塑性L型支架。本文的贡献是用于自然语言驱动的变分仿真的可测量架构，而非开放式的自主代码生成。

title: DeNovoSWE: Scaling Long-Horizon Environments for Generating Entire Repositories from Scratch
authors: Jiale Zhao, Guoxin Chen, Fanzhe Meng, Wayne Xin Zhao, Ruihua Song, Ji-Rong Wen, Kai Jia
abstract: As the capabilities of LLM-based code agents continue to advance, their expected role is expanding beyond localized bug fixing in existing codebases toward architecting and implementing complete software repositories from high-level specifications. However, training agents for such long-horizon software engineering tasks remains difficult due to the scarcity of large-scale, verifiable whole-repository generation data. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{DeNovoSWE}, a large-scale dataset for whole-repository generation. DeNovoSWE comprises 4,818 high-quality instances, where each instance requires generating a complete repository from documentation. Our dataset is automatically constructed through a carefully designed sandboxed agentic workflow, enabling scalable curation without human annotation. DeNovoSWE is constructed with "divide and conquer" and critic-repair philosophy. To balance data quality and diversity, we further introduce a difficulty-aware trajectory filtering strategy. Fine-tuning Qwen3-30B-A3B on DeNovoSWE substantially improves long-horizon SWE performance, raising its score on the challenging BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo benchmark from 5.8% to 47.2%.
title_zh: DeNovoSWE: 扩展长时域环境以从头生成完整代码仓库
abstract_zh: 随着基于大语言模型的代码智能体能力不断增强，其预期角色已从现有代码库中的局部错误修复，扩展为根据高层规范设计并实现完整的软件仓库。然而，由于缺乏大规模、可验证的完整仓库生成数据，针对此类长期软件工程任务训练智能体仍面临挑战。本文提出\textbf{DeNovoSWE}——一个用于完整仓库生成的大规模数据集。DeNovoSWE包含4,818个高质量实例，每个实例要求根据文档生成完整仓库。该数据集通过精心设计的沙箱式智能体工作流程自动构建，无需人工标注即可实现可扩展的整理。DeNovoSWE基于"分而治之"与"批评-修复"理念构建。为平衡数据质量与多样性，我们进一步引入难度感知的轨迹过滤策略。在DeNovoSWE上微调Qwen3-30B-A3B显著提升了长期软件工程任务性能，使其在极具挑战性的BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo基准测试中的得分从5.8%提升至47.2%。

title: MASTOR: A Multi-Agent Approach to Semantic Test Oracle Generation for RESTful APIs
authors: Sida Deng, Rubing Huang, Zhenzhen Yang, Man Zhang, Xuan Xie, Rongcun Wang
abstract: Existing automated RESTful API testing approaches commonly rely on simple checks (e.g., HTTP status codes, schema conformance), which are insufficient for detecting semantic faults, business logic violations, and state-dependent inconsistencies. To address this, we propose MASTOR, a Multi-Agent approach for generating Semantic Test Oracles for RESTful APIs based on implementation source code. MASTOR consists of two phases: source analysis and oracle generation. The former employs a source extraction agent to construct a source context for each endpoint operation by analyzing a transitive import closure of relevant source files. The latter employs two parallel oracle-generation paths over the collected contexts: a single-operation path producing status and field oracles per operation, and a multi-operation path generating behavioral consistency oracles for operation sequences by leveraging cross-operation semantic associations. Both paths apply a challenger-agent review, where a dedicated reviewer identifies weaknesses and issues improvement hints to guide targeted regeneration, followed by oracle normalization to filter out structurally invalid oracles. We evaluated MASTOR on a benchmark of 13 open-source RESTful API projects (296 operations, 251,303 lines of code) from the WFD and PRAB datasets. MASTOR achieved an average mutation score of 75.4%, generating 10,022 oracles. These oracles were translated into executable assertions via ToJUnit and ToPostmanAssertify, and into human-readable descriptions via ToReadable. In a baseline comparison on 50 selected operations, MASTOR outperformed Direct Prompting by 30.1 percentage points (69.9% vs. 39.8%) and SATORI by 49.4 percentage points (69.9% vs. 20.5%).
title_zh: MASTOR：一种面向RESTful API语义测试预言生成的多智能体方法
abstract_zh: 现有的自动化RESTful API测试方法通常依赖于简单的检查（例如HTTP状态码、模式符合性），这些方法不足以检测语义错误、业务逻辑违规以及状态依赖的不一致。为解决这一问题，我们提出了MASTOR——一种基于实现源代码为RESTful API生成语义测试预言的多智能体方法。MASTOR包含两个阶段：源代码分析与预言生成。前一阶段采用源代码提取智能体，通过分析相关源文件的传递导入闭包，为每个端点操作构建源代码上下文。后一阶段在收集的上下文上采用两条并行的预言生成路径：单操作路径为每个操作生成状态和字段预言，多操作路径通过利用跨操作语义关联，为操作序列生成行为一致性预言。两条路径都应用挑战者智能体审查，由专门的审查者识别缺陷并提出改进提示以指导有针对性的重新生成，随后进行预言规范化，过滤掉结构上无效的预言。我们在来自WFD和PRAB数据集的13个开源RESTful API项目基准（296个操作，251,303行代码）上评估了MASTOR。MASTOR实现了平均变异得分75.4%，生成了10,022个预言。这些预言通过ToJUnit和ToPostmanAssertify转换为可执行断言，并通过ToReadable转换为人类可读的描述。在50个选定操作的基线比较中，MASTOR优于直接提示法30.1个百分点（69.9%对39.8%），优于SATORI 49.4个百分点（69.9%对20.5%）。

title: Context-Based Adversarial Attacks on AI Code Generators: Vulnerability Analysis and Implications
authors: Walther A. Del Orbe, John D. Hastings, Varghese Vaidyan
abstract: AI-powered code generation systems have transformed software development but introduce critical inference-time security vulnerabilities. This research presents a systematic investigation of context-based adversarial attacks, where strategically crafted contextual inputs, including comments, documentation, variable names, bias large language models toward generating exploitable code. Through 2,800 controlled experiments across CodeT5+, CodeLlama, GPT-3.5-Turbo, and GPT-4, we quantify attack effectiveness and defense mechanisms. Results demonstrate that adversarial conditions increase vulnerability generation 10.7x (from 3.5% to 37.4%), with direct instruction attacks achieving 100% success on GPT-3.5-Turbo. Cross-model transferability reaches 60-100%, indicating systemic architectural vulnerabilities rather than model-specific flaws. Our dual-layer defense framework achieves 89.1% detection rate with 0.3% false positives and 520ms latency, demonstrating practical feasibility for real-time deployment in development environments.
title_zh: 针对AI代码生成器的基于上下文的对抗攻击：漏洞分析与启示
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能的代码生成系统虽已变革软件开发，却引入了严重的推理时安全漏洞。本研究系统性地探讨了基于上下文的对抗性攻击——通过策略性构造的上下文输入（包括注释、文档、变量名），诱导大语言模型生成可被利用的代码。我们在CodeT5+、CodeLlama、GPT-3.5-Turbo和GPT-4上开展了2,800组受控实验，量化了攻击的有效性与防御机制。结果表明，对抗性条件使漏洞生成率提升10.7倍（从3.5%升至37.4%），其中直接指令攻击对GPT-3.5-Turbo的成功率达100%。跨模型迁移性达60-100%，表明此类问题源于系统性架构缺陷，而非特定模型漏洞。我们的双层防御框架实现了89.1%的检测率、0.3%的误报率及520毫秒的延迟，验证了其在开发环境中实时部署的实用可行性。

title: Benchmarking the Benchmarks for Quantum Code Generation with LLMs
authors: Yunhe Feng, Xiaokun Yang, Kewei Sha, Junhua Ding
publish: 2026 IEEE 19th Dallas Circuits and Systems Conference (DCAS)
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as quantum coding copilots, assisting researchers by generating complex programs for frameworks such as Qiskit, PennyLane, and OpenQASM. However, accurately evaluating the practical utility of these models remains a significant challenge. Existing benchmarks are highly fragmented, ranging from syntax-centric unit tests to simulator- and hardware-aware metrics, making results difficult to compare across different languages and hardware targets. To address this fragmentation, this paper systematically reviews recent evaluation suites and post-training methodologies for quantum code generation. We distill current evaluation criteria into four practical dimensions: syntax and API validity, semantic and physical correctness, resource and hardware feasibility, and execution-based feedback. Building upon these dimensions, we present a unified taxonomy that maps current benchmarks to emerging model adaptation techniques, specifically retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), fine-tuning, multi-agent workflows, and reinforcement learning (RL). Our analysis highlights a clear shift: moving away from prompt-only baselines and toward agentic workflows driven by quantum-verifiable rewards. This shift directly targets the semantic gap between superficially compilable code and physically executable quantum programs. In addition, we identify key research opportunities-such as standardized semantic metrics and integration with quantum error correction-aimed at fostering a more reproducible, verifiable, and hardware-grounded ecosystem for automated quantum software development.
title_zh: 用大语言模型对量子代码生成的基准进行基准测试
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正越来越多地被部署为量子编码副驾驶，通过为Qiskit、PennyLane和OpenQASM等框架生成复杂程序来协助研究人员。然而，准确评估这些模型的实际效用仍然是一项重大挑战。现有基准高度碎片化，涵盖从以语法为中心的单元测试到模拟器和硬件感知的指标，这使得不同语言和硬件目标之间的结果难以比较。为解决这一碎片化问题，本文系统性地回顾了近期关于量子代码生成的评估套件和后训练方法。我们将当前评估标准提炼为四个实用维度：语法和API有效性、语义和物理正确性、资源和硬件可行性，以及基于执行的反馈。基于这些维度，我们提出了一个统一的分类体系，将当前基准映射到新兴的模型自适应技术，特别是检索增强生成（RAG）、微调、多智能体工作流和强化学习（RL）。我们的分析突显了一个明确转变：从仅依赖提示的基线方法转向由量子可验证奖励驱动的智能体工作流。这一转变直接针对表层可编译代码与物理可执行量子程序之间的语义鸿沟。此外，我们确定了关键研究机会——例如标准化语义度量以及与量子纠错技术的集成——旨在为自动化量子软件开发构建一个更可复现、可验证且以硬件为基础的生态系统。

title: DiffRouter: A Differentiable Routing Framework for UltraScale FPGAs
authors: Xiaohan Gao, Zhili Xiong, Yusu Wang, David Z. Pan
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: Routing has become a major bottleneck in large-scale FPGA design flows, where traditional routers rely on sequential net-by-net processing and rip-up-reroute heuristics. This inherent sequentialism limits parallelism, leads to suboptimal utilization of routing resources, and significantly increases runtime on modern FPGAs. This paper introduces DiffRouter, the first differentiable, gradient-based FPGA routing framework with GPU acceleration. By lifting routing into a continuous optimization space, DiffRouter enables highly concurrent routing and improved global optimality before projecting solutions back onto the discrete fabric. The framework consists of three key stages: (1) Resource-pruned preprocessing, which extracts compact routing variables per net to reduce memory footprint and problem complexity; (2) Differentiable global routing via gradient descent, which formulates routing as a Lagrangian-relaxed optimization that minimizes wirelength while iteratively enforcing connectivity and congestion constraints as relaxed terms; and (3) Postprocessing, which maps the continuous wire distributions to a valid UltraScale routing solution and completes solutions by detailed routing. Experiments on the FPGA 2024 Routing Contest benchmarks show that DiffRouter outperforms state-of-the-art parallel routers, achieving over 5× speedup over RWRoute and 2× over Vivado, and running 18% faster than the state-of-the-art academic FPGA router Potter while delivering competitive critical path wirelength.
title_zh: DiffRouter：面向UltraScale FPGA的可微分路由框架
abstract_zh: 在大型FPGA设计流程中，布线已成为主要瓶颈，传统布线器依赖基于网表的顺序处理与拆线重布启发式方法。这种固有的顺序性限制了并行性，导致布线资源利用率低下，并显著增加了现代FPGA的运行时间。本文提出DiffRouter——首个基于梯度可微分的FPGA布线框架，支持GPU加速。通过将布线问题提升至连续优化空间，DiffRouter在将解映射回离散结构前，实现了高度并发的布线操作并提升了全局最优性。该框架包含三个关键阶段：（1）资源剪枝预处理，提取每个网表的紧凑布线变量以降低内存占用和问题复杂度；（2）基于梯度下降的可微分全局布线，将布线形式化为拉格朗日松弛优化，在通过松弛项迭代施加连通性和拥塞约束的同时最小化线长；（3）后处理，将连续线分布映射为有效的UltraScale布线解，并通过详细布线完成方案。在FPGA 2024布线竞赛基准测试上的实验表明，DiffRouter优于最先进的并行布线器：相比RWRoute实现超过5倍加速，相比Vivado实现2倍加速，且比顶尖学术FPGA布线器Potter运行速度快18%，同时保持具有竞争力的关键路径线长。

title: Physics-Informed Neural and Graph Learning Framework for Operational Amplifier Performance Prediction and Sizing
authors: Rejith Kumar G, Yukti Kumar, Achyutha S, Sunita M S
publish: 2026 IEEE 19th Dallas Circuits and Systems Conference (DCAS)
abstract: This paper presents a neural network approach to designing and optimizing operational amplifiers. The novelty of the work lies in the approach that combines a PhysicsInformed Neural Network (PINN), which enforces steady-state differential-algebraic circuit equations, with a topology-aware Physics-Informed Graph Neural Network (PI-GNN) derived from physics-embedded circuit graphs. This dual-path architecture enables accurate forward performance prediction as well as inverse design, directly mapping target specifications to optimal transistor dimensions. The framework is trained and validated using high-fidelity Cadence Virtuoso simulations. Experimental results demonstrate prediction errors below 5% for key metrics, which include DC gain, unity-gain bandwidth, phase margin, slew rate, and CMRR. The inverse sizing achieves specification matching within 5% without iterative SPICE optimization, highlighting the effectiveness of physics-guided neural and graph learning for scalable analog IC design automation.
title_zh: 物理信息驱动的神经与图学习框架用于运算放大器性能预测与尺寸设计
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的运算放大器设计与优化方法。该工作的创新之处在于，它将物理信息神经网络（PINN）——用于强制执行稳态微分代数电路方程——与从物理嵌入电路图导出的拓扑感知型物理信息图神经网络（PI-GNN）相结合。这种双路径架构既能够实现精确的前向性能预测，也能实现逆向设计，直接根据目标规格映射出最优晶体管尺寸。该框架利用高保真度的Cadence Virtuoso仿真数据进行了训练与验证。实验结果表明，直流增益、单位增益带宽、相位裕度、压摆率和共模抑制比等关键指标的预测误差均低于5%。逆向尺寸缩放实现了规格匹配误差在5%以内，无需迭代式SPICE优化，突显了物理引导的神经网络与图学习在实现可扩展的模拟集成电路设计自动化中的有效性。

title: An Improved Graphical Method for Layout Optimization of Field-Limiting Ring Edge Termination
authors: Kiyoshi Takeuchi, Munetoshi Fukui, Takuya Saraya, Kazuo Itou, Toshihiko Takakura, Shinichi Suzuki, Hiroyuki Takase, Toshiro Hiramoto
abstract: An improved graphical method for optimizing the layout of field-limiting rings (FLRs) for edge termination is proposed. The required number of rings and the optimal combination of spacings between adjacent rings can be efficiently determined through a simple procedure based on TCAD simulations of three-terminal model structures. In a 1.2kV-class Si diode design example, the proposed method achieved 97% of the target breakdown voltage and 92% of the ideal parallel-plate breakdown voltage using 24 rings. Acomparison with a previously proposed method and numerical optimization results is also provided to further validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
title_zh: 一种改进的图形方法用于场限环边缘终端的布局优化
abstract_zh: 提出了一种改进的图形化方法，用于优化边缘终端场限环（FLR）的布局。通过基于三端模型结构的TCAD仿真，采用简单步骤即可高效确定所需环数及相邻环间距的最优组合。在1.2kV级硅二极管设计实例中，所提方法使用24个环实现了目标击穿电压的97%，以及理想平行平板击穿电压的92%。同时，通过与先前提出的方法及数值优化结果进行比较，进一步验证了该方法的有效性。

title: PathSteiner: Improving PathFinder with Quasi-Optimal Steiner-Tree Initialization
authors: Shashwat Shrivastava, Luka Kurešević, Alexandros Poupakis, Chirag Ravishankar, Dinesh Gaitonde, Stefan Nikolić, Mirjana Stojilović
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: FPGA routing has been studied for a few decades due to its critical role in determining both the quality of results and compilation time. Recent work has shown that constructing more resource-efficient routing trees can improve both runtime and wirelength. Yet, the proposed approach of constructing multiple routing trees per net via random sink orderings—within the PathFinder routing paradigm—and selecting the best candidate becomes increasingly impractical as net fanout grows. This limitation arises because the space of possible sink orderings grows super-exponentially, allowing only a small fraction of it to be explored in practice. Moreover, even exhaustive enumeration of all sink permutations for low-fanout nets does not necessarily yield an optimal routing tree. To address these limitations, we initialize routing with quasi-optimal rectilinear Steiner trees to better cover the solution space across net fanouts. Our results show that, because these trees are only weakly congestion-aware, the final routed wirelength gains are real but fall short of the wirelength advantage implied by the seeded trees. How much of the gain remains depends on how effectively PathFinder resolves congestion while staying close to the seed. We report an average 6% improvement in wirelength, along with an 8× reduction in runtime on the most congested benchmark, which otherwise takes more than half a day to route.
title_zh: PathSteiner：利用准最优斯坦纳树初始化改进PathFinder
abstract_zh: FPGA布线由于其对于结果质量和编译时间的关键决定作用，已被研究数十年。近期研究表明，构建更高效利用资源的布线树可同时改善运行时间和线长。然而，在PathFinder布线范式中，通过随机顺序的端点排序为每个线网构建多个布线树并选择最优候选方案的做法，随着线网扇出增加而愈发不切实际。这一局限性源于可能的端点排序空间呈超指数增长，实践中仅能探索其中极小一部分。此外，即使对低扇出线网穷举所有端点排列，也未必能生成最优布线树。为解决这些问题，我们采用准最优直线斯坦纳树初始化布线，以更好地覆盖不同扇下线网的解空间。结果表明，由于这些树仅具有较弱的拥塞感知能力，最终布线后的线长改进确实存在，但未能达到种子树所隐含的线长优势。剩余的改进幅度取决于PathFinder在尽可能贴近种子树的同时解决拥塞的能力。我们在最拥挤的基准测试中报告了平均6%的线长改善，以及8倍的运行时间缩减——而该基准测试原本需要超过半天时间才能完成布线。

title: Combining HLS and Computation Coding for Balanced Matrix-Vector Engines on FPGA
authors: Sayanti Pal, Alexander Lehnert, Marc Reichenbach
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: Limited number of DSP48 blocks versus abundant LUTs constrains the throughput of FPGA-based constant matrix–vector multiplications (MVM). We exploit Linear Computation-Coding (LCC) to build multiplier-less, deeply pipelined adder graphs on LUTs and combine it with a DSP-mapped HLS datapath via a pragmatic column-split partition. This hybrid mapping achieves balanced DSP and LUT utilization without sacrificing throughput, resulting in a scalable, high-performance MVM on FPGAs.
title_zh: 在FPGA上结合HLS与计算编码以实现平衡的矩阵向量引擎
abstract_zh: 有限的DSP48块数量与丰富的LUT资源制约了基于FPGA的常数矩阵-向量乘法（MVM）的吞吐量。我们利用线性计算编码（LCC）在LUT上构建无乘法器的深度流水线加法图，并通过实用的列拆分分区将其与DSP映射的HLS数据路径相结合。这种混合映射在不牺牲吞吐量的情况下实现了DSP和LUT利用率的平衡，从而在FPGA上实现了可扩展的高性能MVM。

title: MSA-CongNet: Multi-Scale Attention with Noise-Aware Regularization for VLSI Congestion Prediction
authors: Ziyan Qu, Yuxiang Liu, Wenjun Zhu, Zhengkang Zhu
publish: 2026 8th International Conference on Information Science, Electrical and Automation Engineering (ISEAE)
abstract: Accurate congestion prediction at the placement stage is critical for reducing design iterations and accelerating timing closure in modern electronic design automation (EDA) flows. Although learning-based methods have shown promise on EDA benchmarks such as CircuitNet, existing approaches suffer from three persistent limitations: (1) single-scale feature extraction fails to capture the spatial heterogeneity of congestion patterns ranging from local pin clusters to global routing demand; (2) convolutional architectures lack explicit modeling of long-range dependencies between distant hotspots sharing routing resources; and (3) models trained on early-stage placement features are brittle under the inherent noise of pre-routing estimations. To address these challenges, we propose MSA-CongNet, a unified framework comprising three synergistic modules: (1) a Multi-Scale Feature Pyramid (MSFP) that encodes hierarchical spatial context through top-down fusion across four resolution levels; (2) a Spatial Cross-Attention (SCA) mechanism with learnable geometric bias that captures non-local hotspot correlations; and (3) a Noise-Aware Regularization (NAR) strategy that enforces prediction consistency under controlled input perturbation. Experiments on CircuitNet demonstrate that MSA-CongNet reduces MAE by 36.8% over the strongest baseline while achieving 24% faster inference.
title_zh: MSA-CongNet: 面向VLSI拥塞预测的多尺度注意力与噪声感知正则化
abstract_zh: 在当代电子设计自动化（EDA）流程中，布局阶段的精确拥塞预测对于减少设计迭代、加速时序收敛至关重要。尽管基于学习的方法在CircuitNet等EDA基准上展现出潜力，现有方法仍存在三个持久性缺陷：（1）单尺度特征提取无法捕捉从局部引脚簇到全局布线需求的空间异质性拥塞模式；（2）卷积架构缺乏对共享布线资源的远距离热点间长程依赖的显式建模；（3）基于早期布局特征训练的模型在前布线估计的固有噪声下表现脆弱。为解决这些问题，我们提出MSA-CongNet，一个包含三个协同模块的统一框架：（1）多尺度特征金字塔（MSFP），通过四个分辨率层级上的自顶向下融合编码层次化空间上下文；（2）空间交叉注意力（SCA）机制，结合可学习几何偏差以捕捉非局部热点相关性；（3）噪声感知正则化（NAR）策略，在受控输入扰动下强制预测一致性。在CircuitNet上的实验表明，MSA-CongNet在最强基线基础上平均绝对误差降低36.8%，同时推理速度提升24%。

title: A Cascading Deep Learning Framework for Large-Scale Microwave Circuit Design
authors: Changchun Li, Weidong Chen, Chang Chen, Xiang Zhang, Sensong An
publish: 2026 IEEE 19th Dallas Circuits and Systems Conference (DCAS)
abstract: Electromagnetic (EM) simulation of large-scale, non-periodic microwave structures poses prohibitive computational challenges. Meanwhile, conventional domain decomposition methods (DDM) often struggle to resolve complex inter-subdomain connectivity. To address these limitations, we propose a novel AI-based computational framework leveraging the Multi-port Analysis Pixel EM Simulator (MAPES). This approach enables arbitrary partition connectivity and achieves rapid performance prediction with minimal training data requirements. Furthermore, to mitigate accuracy degradation arising from physical approximations, a neural network-based residual correction module is integrated to systematically refine the predictive responses. This hybrid physics-informed approach reduces computational complexity by orders of magnitude while maintaining high fidelity, providing a scalable and efficient solution for advanced EM design.
title_zh: 一种用于大规模微波电路设计的级联深度学习框架
abstract_zh: 电磁（EM）仿真对大规模、非周期性微波结构带来了难以承受的计算挑战。同时，传统的域分解方法（DDM）往往难以解决复杂的子域间连接问题。为克服这些局限，我们提出了一种基于人工智能的新型计算框架，该框架利用多端口分析像素电磁模拟器（MAPES）。该方法能够实现任意的分区连接，并在极少的训练数据需求下实现快速性能预测。此外，为减轻物理近似带来的精度下降，我们集成了一个基于神经网络的残差校正模块，以系统地优化预测响应。这种混合物理信息方法将计算复杂度降低了数个数量级，同时保持了高保真度，为先进的电磁设计提供了一种可扩展且高效的解决方案。

title: A Comparative Study on Data Structures for Power Electronical Circuit Topology Derivation
authors: Botao Cao, Ke Jin, Xujun Jiang, Xingshuo Li
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Energy, Electrical and Power Engineering (CEEPE)
abstract: The conventional topology derivation methods suffer from low efficiency and difficulties in exhaustively enumerating all possible topological structures. New approaches utilizing different graph-based storage structures still lack a comparative study on the applicability of various storage formats under different circuit conditions. Using the Buck converter as an example, this paper conducts a systematic comparative study of three graph-based storage structures, which include the adjacency matrix, adjacency list, and orthogonal list. Their performance is evaluated across three key dimensions: memory usage, runtime efficiency under different circuit scales, and capability to handle bidirectional components. It is indicated that each structure exhibits distinct advantages: the adjacency matrix is suitable for small-scale topology verification; the adjacency list offers balanced performance in medium-scale circuits; while the orthogonal list achieves optimal efficiency in large-scale circuits with multiple bidirectional components. This study provides a quantitative basis for selecting data structures in automated topology derivation. All findings are thoroughly validated through simulations.
title_zh: 电力电子电路拓扑推导的数据结构对比研究
abstract_zh: 传统的拓扑推导方法效率低且难以穷举所有可能的拓扑结构。采用不同基于图的存储结构的新方法，仍缺乏对不同电路条件下各存储格式适用性的比较研究。本文以Buck变换器为例，系统比较了三种基于图的存储结构——邻接矩阵、邻接表和十字链表。从三个关键维度评估其性能：内存占用、不同电路规模下的运行效率，以及处理双向元件的能力。结果表明，每种结构均展现独特优势：邻接矩阵适用于小规模拓扑验证；邻接表在中规模电路中性能均衡；而十字链表在含多双向元件的大规模电路中实现最优效率。本研究为自动拓扑推导中数据结构的选择提供了定量依据。所有结论均通过仿真充分验证。

title: Survey and Roadmap for Efficiency-Accuracy Cooptimization Towards Embodied AI Chip Design
authors: Jianwei Zhao, Hongnian Yu, Yun Li
publish: 2026 6th International Symposium on Intelligent Robotics and Systems (ISoIRS)
abstract: The embodied intelligence chip is the “brain” of the embodied agent, which enables the agent to autonomously make decisions and perform actions in complex and dynamic real physical environments. Conventional chip design optimization methodologies are predominantly based on static solutions and manual strategies. These methods face the “curse of dimensionality” and time-varying challenges such as dynamic loads and thermodynamic constraints. This article reviews related research in three aspects: dynamic-aware chip architectures, intelligent optimization strategy design, and LLM-driven automated design. For prospects, the “AI codesign paradigm” is constructed, in which <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$A I$</tex> is not only specialized in design, but also in requirement analysis, multiscale modeling, knowledge transfer, strategy enhancement, and verification, to realize autonomous design optimization. Jointly, outlook is drawn with respect to constructing MCU+NPU heterogeneous computing architectures, SSM world model collaboration mechanisms, and integrated sensing-computingcontrol systems.
title_zh: 面向具身AI芯片设计的效率-精度协同优化综述与路线图
abstract_zh: 具身智能芯片是具身智能体的“大脑”，使其能够在复杂、动态的真实物理环境中自主决策并执行动作。传统的芯片设计优化方法主要基于静态解决方案和人工策略，面临“维数灾难”以及动态负载、热力学约束等时变挑战。本文从三个方面综述相关研究：动态感知芯片架构、智能化优化策略设计以及大语言模型驱动的自动化设计。展望未来，构建了“AI协同设计范式”，其中AI不仅专精于设计，还涉足需求分析、多尺度建模、知识迁移、策略增强与验证，以实现自主设计优化。同时，对构建MCU+NPU异构计算架构、SSM世界模型协同机制以及感算控一体化系统进行了展望。

title: VulnCloud Scanner: Lightweight Multiengine Scanning for Container Security
authors: Divas A S, Barath S, Geethanjali D, Umasankari N
publish: 2026 International Conference on Signal, Systems, and Computing for Next-Gen Automation (ICSSCNA)
abstract: Container security has become a major issue for organizations adopting cloud-native architectures. Existing scanner reports lack exploit context, deployment-specific applicability and knowledge of whether the vulnerable function is ever executed. This leaves security teams overwhelmed by alerts that are theoretically flagged but practically irrelevant. This paper presents VulnCloud, an open-source Kubernetesnative framework that turns inconsistent scanner results into actionable and deployment-aware risk signals. The VulnCloud orchestrates many scanning engines through a confidenceweighted consensus model. Enriches findings with exploitlikelihood and threat intel, context-aware applicability filtering, and validates exploitability through hybrid static call-graph and runtime reachability analysis. An admission controller enforces the composite risk score through policy-as-code to block images. On evaluation over 100 diverse container images, VulnCloud achieves a decision accuracy of 96.8 %, a precision of 99.7 %, and a false-positive rate of 0.5 %. This offers security teams a fully auditable, CI/CD native pipeline that is low-noise and highassurance.
title_zh: VulnCloud Scanner：用于容器安全的轻量级多引擎扫描
abstract_zh: 随着云原生架构的普及，容器安全已成为企业面临的关键挑战。现有的扫描报告缺乏漏洞利用上下文、部署环境特定适用性以及易受攻击函数是否实际被执行的知识。这导致安全团队被大量理论上标记但实际无关的告警所淹没。本文提出VulnCloud——一个开源、Kubernetes原生的框架，能够将不一致的扫描结果转化为可操作且基于部署感知的风险信号。VulnCloud通过置信度加权共识模型协调多个扫描引擎，结合漏洞利用可能性与威胁情报丰富检测结果，进行上下文感知的适用性过滤，并通过混合静态调用图与运行时可达性分析验证漏洞利用可行性。此外，准入控制器通过策略即代码执行复合风险评分以拦截镜像。在对超过100个多样化容器镜像的评估中，VulnCloud实现了96.8%的决策准确率、99.7%的精确率以及0.5%的误报率。这为安全团队提供了一个完全可审计、集成于CI/CD原生管道的低噪音、高可信度解决方案。

title: Earliest Failure Localization in Pipelines Via Quantum Search
authors: Alexander Fisher, Christophe Bobda
publish: 2026 IEEE 19th Dallas Circuits and Systems Conference (DCAS)
abstract: Debugging pipelined RTL designs is often delayed by weak localization: a failure may be observed late in a trace even when the first illegal condition occurs earlier and is later masked or overwritten. We formulate earliest-stage localization as a predicate search problem over a fixed environment model. Stage-scoped Boolean (and bounded-temporal) rules induce perstage violation predicates and an earliest-stage predicate that accepts an assignment only when a stage violates and no earlier stage violates, yielding disjoint attribution by construction. We show how to realize this predicate as a reversible compute-phase-uncompute oracle, and we cast oracle synthesis as a time-space optimization problem on the predicate's Boolean directed acyclic graph under a hard workspace budget. Our main contribution is a budgeted active-volume compilation pass that emits legal compute/uncompute schedules with peak live intermediates bounded by an ancilla budget, while minimizing a recomputation-aware unit-cost proxy. A grounded case study on an exported 41-node predicate graph demonstrates the induced workspace-recomputation tradeoff and separates exact versus heuristic scheduling behavior in the tight-budget regime.
title_zh: 基于量子搜索的流水线最早故障定位
abstract_zh: 调试流水线RTL设计时，薄弱定位能力常常导致延迟：即使首个非法条件发生在更早阶段，随后被掩盖或覆盖，故障也可能在跟踪的后期才被观察到。我们将最早阶段定位问题形式化为固定环境模型上的谓词搜索问题。阶段范围的布尔（和有界时态）规则生成每个阶段的违规谓词，以及一个最早阶段谓词——该谓词仅在某个阶段违规且无更早阶段违规时才接受赋值，从而通过构造实现不相交的归因。我们展示了如何将该谓词实现为可逆的计算-相位-反计算预言机，并将预言机综合问题转化为谓词布尔有向无环图上的时空优化问题（受限于硬工作空间预算）。我们的主要贡献是一种预算化的活跃体积编译流程，它能够在辅量子比特预算约束下生成合法的计算/反计算调度，同时最小化重计算感知的单位成本代理。基于一个导出的41节点谓词图的实例研究，展示了由此产生的工作空间-重计算权衡，并在严格预算场景下区分了精确调度与启发式调度的行为。

title: Quantum-Rag: Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Quantum Circuit Code Generation
authors: Nicholas Stapleton, Sharmin Afrose, Ethan Seefried, Vicente Leyton Ortega, Travis S. Humble, Tirthankar Ghosal
publish: 2026 IEEE 19th Dallas Circuits and Systems Conference (DCAS)
abstract: Generating correct and executable quantum circuit code remains a significant barrier for both newcomers and experienced practitioners in quantum computing. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in classical code generation, their application to quantum programming is hampered by limited domain-specific training data and the rapidly evolving nature of quantum software frameworks. In this work, we present Quantum-RAG, an extended Retrieval-Augmented Generation framework that couples a domain-specialized language model with a curated, multi-source knowledge corpus to produce Qiskit-based quantum circuit code. Our three-stage pipeline ingests documentation, educational notebooks, and research literature into a dense retrieval index and augments the generation model with the most relevant context at inference time. Evaluated on the Qiskit HumanEval benchmark, QuantumRAG achieves a Pass@1 of 0.4132, a Pass@3 of 0.6291, and a Pass@5 of 0.7020, surpassing the domain-adapted GraniteQiskit baseline by 101%, 72%, and 47 % at each respective threshold. These results demonstrate that retrieval-augmented approaches can substantially improve quantum code generation without expensive model retraining.
title_zh: 量子-RAG：用于量子电路代码生成的检索增强生成框架
abstract_zh: 生成正确且可执行的量子电路代码仍然是量子计算领域新手和经验丰富的从业者面临的一大障碍。尽管大型语言模型（LLM）在经典代码生成方面已展现出潜力，但其在量子编程中的应用受到领域特定训练数据有限以及量子软件框架快速演变的制约。在本研究中，我们提出了Quantum-RAG——一种扩展的检索增强生成框架，它将领域专用语言模型与经过策划的多源知识库相结合，以生成基于Qiskit的量子电路代码。我们的三阶段流程将文档、教学笔记本和研究文献整合到密集检索索引中，并在推理时用最相关的上下文增强生成模型。在Qiskit HumanEval基准测试中，Quantum-RAG的Pass@1为0.4132，Pass@3为0.6291，Pass@5为0.7020，分别比领域适配的GraniteQiskit基线高出101%、72%和47%。这些结果表明，检索增强方法无需昂贵的模型重新训练即可显著提升量子代码生成能力。

title: Early Detection of Hardware Trojans Using Neural Controlled Differential Equations and Analysis of Power Traces
authors: Hasala Senevirathne, Rahul Vishwakarma, Amin Rezaei
publish: 2026 IEEE 19th Dallas Circuits and Systems Conference (DCAS)
abstract: Evolving Hardware Trojans pose a serious threat to modern digital systems by evading traditional detection through stealthy, adaptive behavior. Even recent methods that leverage advances in machine learning can only detect them after activation, leaving a critical window for potential security breaches. To address this gap, we propose a novel approach for hardware Trojan detection and prediction using Neural Controlled Differential Equations (NCDEs) and analysis of power traces. Our method leverages an NCDE model trained exclusively on Trojan-free data to learn nominal power behavior, combined with a Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA) classifier calibrated on labeled data, to distinguish between three scenarios: no Trojan, dormant Trojan, and active Trojan. Our method uses a sliding window to process side-channel measurements, enabling detection of subtle power consumption deviations that indicate Trojan presence, even when dormant. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed NCDE-based method achieves superior accuracy compared to traditional machine learning approaches, with the additional advantage of handling dormant Trojans above a sensitivity threshold. We validate our approach on standard hardware Trojan benchmarks, showing robust detection and prediction performance.
title_zh: 基于神经控制微分方程与功率迹分析的硬件木马早期检测
abstract_zh: 演化型硬件木马通过隐蔽且自适应的行为规避传统检测，对现代数字系统构成严重威胁。即便是近年来利用机器学习进展的新方法，也只能在木马激活后才能检测，这为潜在安全漏洞留下了关键窗口期。为弥补这一不足，我们提出了一种基于神经控制微分方程（NCDEs）与功耗迹线分析的硬件木马检测与预测新方法。该方法利用仅基于无木马数据训练的NCDE模型学习标称功耗行为，并结合基于标注数据校准的线性判别分析（LDA）分类器，以区分三种场景：无木马、休眠木马与激活木马。我们采用滑动窗口处理侧信道测量值，从而能够检测出指示木马存在的微小功耗偏差，即便木马处于休眠状态。实验结果表明，与传统的机器学习方法相比，所提出的基于NCDE的方法实现了更优的准确性，且额外具备在灵敏度阈值以上检测休眠木马的能力。我们在标准硬件木马基准上验证了该方法，显示出稳健的检测与预测性能。
